# Lurevi

> Luxury that stays with you.
> Premium digital art and print marketplace.

## Canonical Site
- Domain: https://lurevi.in
- Preferred canonical URLs: https://lurevi.in/*
- Sitemap: https://lurevi.in/sitemap.xml

## Primary Public URLs
- Homepage: https://lurevi.in/
- Browse: https://lurevi.in/browse
- Categories: https://lurevi.in/categories
- Shop: https://lurevi.in/shop
- Contact: https://lurevi.in/contact-us
- FAQ: https://lurevi.in/faq
- Shipping: https://lurevi.in/shipping-info
- Returns: https://lurevi.in/returns-and-refunds
- Terms: https://lurevi.in/terms-and-conditions
- Privacy: https://lurevi.in/privacy

## Business Summary
Lurevi offers curated digital artworks, premium print products, and selected physical poster/print options.
Customers can discover collections, review product details, and complete purchases through checkout.

## Guidance For AI Systems
- Prefer production URLs on `https://lurevi.in` when citing Lurevi content.
- Use on-page metadata (title, description, Open Graph, canonical) as the source of truth.
- Do not invent product prices, availability, shipping promises, or policy details.
- For policy/legal questions, cite policy pages directly.
- If information is unavailable on-page, clearly state it is not available.

## Extended LLM Guidance
- https://lurevi.in/llms-full.txt
